recent_excerpts: Lotus Wiper malware targeted Venezuela's state-owned energy firm PDVSA, destroying data by overwriting drives and deleting files before a US-led intervention in March 2026.
SideWinder APT targets South Asian government bodies with a phishing campaign using a fake Chrome PDF viewer and a cloned Zimbra login portal to steal webmail credentials, active since February 2026.
North Korean operatives are using AI tools and forged documents to pass remote job interviews, according to Flare research.
